portForwarding.title: Remote Access
portForwarding.description: Access the system from any device on the local network
portForwarding.localAccessDesc: Scan QR Code to access the system from mobile or any device connected to the same network
portForwarding.noConnection: Unable to get IP address. Make sure you're connected to the network

instructions.title: How to Use
instructions.step1: Make sure the target device (mobile/tablet) is connected to the same Wi-Fi network as the system
instructions.step2: Open your phone's camera or QR Scanner app and scan the code
instructions.step3: Or copy the URL and open it in the browser on any device connected to the same network
instructions.step4: You'll have full access to the system from any device on the local network
instructions.warning: ⚠️ Note: This URL only works on devices connected to the same Wi-Fi network. For external access, you'll need to configure Port Forwarding on your router.
